steps.title: Make a two-row table
steps.content: The problem gives one point and one rate. Since $y=18$ when $x=2$, enter $(2,18)$. Because every increase of $1$ in $x$ increases $y$ by $8$, the next point is $(3,26)$.

steps.title: Use linear regression
steps.content: Type $y_1\sim m x_1+b$. Desmos returns $m=8$ and $b=2$, so the equation is $y=8x+2$.

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: Choice C is the only equation with slope $8$ and intercept $2$. A quick check gives $8(2)+2=18$, so choice C is correct.
